title: bebbia juncea var. atriplicifolia
intro: Bebbia juncea var. atriplicifolia, also known as Desert Holly or Desert Marigold, is a shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Bebbia juncea var. atriplicifolia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, salves, and tinctures, which can be used topically to treat minor skin irritations and injuries.
